title: A Winter Day, a Fateful Night
overview: Shirou Emiya is a high school student who always helps people around him whenever he has a spare moment. His dream has always been to become a hero of justice. One night, he stumbles upon a battle between two Servants...

title: The Curtain Rises
overview: Rin takes Shirou and Saber to the church in New Fuyuki. She introduces Shirou to Kotomine Kirei. Will Shirou accept to participate in the Holy Grail War despite all the danger?

title: The First Battle
overview: Rin and Shirou run into a girl named Illyasviel von Einzbern. She has a Servant who is a big mad monster! What does this girl want from them?

title: Finding the Will to Fight
overview: Saber tells Shirou all about Heroic Spirits and Noble Phantasms. She explains why she doesn't want to reveal her true identity to him. Shirou wants Saber to stay at his place for a while. Will Fujimura approve this request?

title: Dancing After School
overview: A student went missing after her archery club practice. The last person to talk to her was Shinji. And now Shinji is nowhere to be found either!

title: Mirage
overview: Shirou and Rin continue investigating the bounded field at the school. Will they be able to solve this mystery and find out who the third Master is?

title: The Reward for the Fight to the Death
overview: Saber faces Assassin while Archer and Caster go into battle against each other! What will be the outcome?

title: Winter Days, Where the Heart is
overview: Shirou continues his training with Saber. She is glad that his abilities have improved, but there is something different about his technique. Meanwhile, Rin suspects there is a fourth Master at school.

title: The Distance Between Them
overview: Archer finally arrives at the scene in the school. Rin fills him in on what happened. Together with Shirou and Saber, they plan to find out who the real Master of Caster is. After losing Rider, Shinji heads to the church!

title: The Fifth Contractor
overview: Rin suspects Kuzuki might be the Master of Caster. With the help of a hesitant Shirou, she implements a dangerous plan in a remote location to test out her theory.

title: A Visitor Approaches Lightly
overview: After making progress with the development of his projection magic, Shirou starts experiencing the side effects of having pushed his body to the limit.

title: The Final Decision
overview: Rin finally asks Shirou out on a date, but their enjoyment is cut short when Caster makes her move. Shirou is forced to make a difficult decision to protect the people he cares about.

title: Time of Departure
overview: Caster keeps Saber hostage, but Kuzuki is not happy with his Servant calling her own shots. Rin, determined to take out Caster and her Master, orders Archer to take out Kuzuki. Will Archer do as she says?

title: The Princess of Colchis
overview: Despite losing Saber, Shirou is determined to fight. Since Caster is protected by Kuzuki and Archer, Shirou and Rin decide to team up with another Master. Left with no other option, they set out to find Illyasviel and Berserker.

title: A Battle of Legend
overview: Shirou and Rin finally reach the castle where Illyasviel and Berserker are. However, there are other unexpected guests visiting Illyasviel.

title: Winter Days, the Form Wishes Take
overview: Shirou is devastated since he was unable to save Illyasviel. Together with Rin, he is determined to fight Caster and the others. Out of the blue, they are visited by a Servant who is willing to lend a hand!

title: The Dark Sword Bares Its Fangs
overview: Rin and Shirou begin their battle against Caster and Kuzuki while Lancer faces off with Archer. Will Rin's plan work in the end?

title: The Beginning of the Circle
overview: Now that Archer is no longer Rin's Servant, he is determined to kill Shirou. However, Shirou is not afraid of him. Rin and Saber are willing to do anything to stop Archer!

title: Idealism's End (The Answer)
overview: Together with Saber and Lancer, Shirou is set out to rescue Rin. Will he be able to beat Archer in a battle?

title: Unlimited Blade Works.
overview: Rin is helpless now in Kirei's hands, while Shirou faces Archer. Is he skillful enough to defeat Archer?

title: Answer
overview: Shirou's battle with Archer continues. But then an unexpected visitor appears, and new information unfolds.

title: Winter Days, a Long Way Home
overview: Wishing to avenge Archer and destroy the Holy Grail once and for all, Rin and Shirou consider their options and try to come up with a strategy.

title: Incarnation
overview: While Saber faces off against the guard at the gate, Shirou and Rin try to destroy the Holy Grail!

title: Unlimited Blade Works
overview: With everything seeming to be against them, will Shirou and Rin be able to survive?

title: Epilogue
overview: The Holy Grail War is over... The dust has settled... What awaits Rin and Shirou on their next journey?
